summary: Iteration 4 (timezone, push tokens, medication history + weekly compliance chart) fully verified. Backend pytest 14/14 PASS on iter4 suite + 17/17 PASS on iter3 regression against https://family-guard-37.preview.emergentagent.com. Frontend mobile-web (390x844): signup → dashboard works, push-token call gracefully no-ops on web (0 network requests, 0 console errors, no red screen), member detail successfully fetches /history/member/{id}?days=7 and renders <ComplianceChart testID=compliance-chart> with bars, day labels, totals & % after marking reminders.

issues: Card label still reads 'Expected check-in time (UTC)' — hard-coded UTC string in settingLabel even though backend now uses per-user timezone. Cosmetic mismatch; consider showing user.timezone label instead.
RN-Web warnings persist (carried from iter1-3): 'shadow*' deprecated → boxShadow; expo-notifications listener warning on web (cosmetic, harmless).

action_items: Optional UI polish: replace hard-coded 'Expected check-in time (UTC)' with dynamic user.timezone label (member/[id].tsx line ~209).
Optional: silence RN-Web 'shadow*' deprecation by migrating to boxShadow (carried over).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py /api/auth/signup correctly validates timezone via ZoneInfo and falls back to UTC on ZoneInfoNotFoundError; default 'UTC' when omitted — verified.
PUT /api/auth/timezone returns 400 for invalid IANA names (Mars/Olympus) — verified.
POST /api/auth/push-token uses $addToSet for dedup and validates ExponentPushToken[...] prefix — verified.
POST /api/reminders/{id}/mark now writes to db.medication_logs with reminder_id, member_id, status, marked_at, local_date — verified end-to-end via /history.
GET /api/history/member/{id}?days=7 returns series[7] + totals + compliance_percent + timezone; filters by category=medication only; clamps days to [1,30] — verified.
detect_missed_checkins, reset_daily_reminder_statuses, dashboard /summary, POST /sos, /checkins all use user_tz(current) via ZoneInfo — verified message includes EST/EDT label.
DELETE /api/members/{id} cascades to reminders, checkins, and medication_logs — verified via post-delete history 404.
expo_push.send_expo_push is best-effort: invalid tokens filtered, HTTP/timeout errors logged not raised — safe.
Frontend AuthContext.signup auto-sends Intl device tz; login PUTs /auth/timezone only on diff — correct.
Frontend push.ts registerForPushNotifications returns null on Platform.OS==='web' BEFORE calling API — no /auth/push-token POST fires on web (verified 0 network requests).
member/[id].tsx: history.catch(() => ({data: null})) gracefully handles fetch failure; ComplianceChart conditionally rendered only when totals.logged > 0 — correct.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on critical flows: signup w/ tz, web push no-op, member detail + history + compliance-chart render, mark taken/missed.

seed_data_creation: Fresh users v4test+<uuid>@kinnectcare.app and v4ui+<uuid>@kinnectcare.app (password123) — auto-seeds Gregory + James + 3 meds + 4 routines + 2 alerts; medication_logs created on /mark calls.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iter4 features pass end-to-end. Browser headless container reports Intl tz='UTC', so chart label shows 'UTC'; backend curl tests use America/New_York explicitly to validate tz logic + SOS EST/EDT label. Use email TLD .app/.com/.org (Pydantic rejects .test). The compliance-chart only renders when totals.logged > 0 (≥1 medication mark) — routine marks do NOT appear in chart by design (server.py filters category='medication').
